title: MOORE STREET SHELTER - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY PORTLAND METRO MOORE STREET SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an overnight shelter with 100 beds. Provides food, sleeping mats, and hygiene supplies. 5325 N Williams Avenue Portland, OR 97217 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who identify as female. Pets permitted as space allows. Hours: 7 days per week 8pm-6am Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. First-come, first-served. Priority is given to guests from the previous night. New guest line up begins no earlier than 30 minutes before opening. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 72 and 44. On the corner of N Moore Avenue and N Killingsworth Street. Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Women Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - COMMUNITY FACILITY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY PORTLAND METRO
